turns.user_message: I used to get excited about my day, but now I just feel flat. It's like my spark has gone out.
This feeling of just going through the motions has lasted for months now. I can't seem to shake this heavy dullness.
I feel completely hollowed out and I don't even recognize myself anymore. The person I was is just gone.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This has been going on for a while.
